mapper.sql: lock_id, tenant_id, entity_type, entity_id, locked_by_user_id, locked_at, lock_payload_hash, status, unlock_committee_user_id, unlock_committee_at, unlock_committee_signature, unlock_street_user_id, unlock_street_at, unlock_street_signature, unlock_at, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_governance_lock WHERE lock_id = #{lockId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_governance_lock ( tenant_id, entity_type, entity_id, locked_by_user_id, locked_at, lock_payload_hash, status, unlock_committee_user_id, unlock_committee_at, unlock_committee_signature, unlock_street_user_id, unlock_street_at, unlock_street_signature, unlock_at, version ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{lockedByUserId}, #{lockedAt}, #{lockPayloadHash}, #{status}, #{unlockCommitteeUserId}, #{unlockCommitteeAt}, #{unlockCommitteeSignature}, #{unlockStreetUserId}, #{unlockStreetAt}, #{unlockStreetSignature}, #{unlockAt}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_governance_lock SET status = #{status}, unlock_committee_user_id = #{unlockCommitteeUserId}, unlock_committee_at = #{unlockCommitteeAt}, unlock_committee_signature = #{unlockCommitteeSignature}, unlock_street_user_id = #{unlockStreetUserId}, unlock_street_at = #{unlockStreetAt}, unlock_street_signature = #{unlockStreetSignature}, unlock_at = #{unlockAt}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE lock_id = #{lockId} AND version = #{version}
